name: genpark-refund-policy-optimizer-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Analyze refund patterns, score policy strictness vs customer experience, and generate optimized refund policy recommendations for e-commerce stores.
author: genpark

refund_records.description: List of refund records with amount, reason, days_since_purchase, and approved fields.

current_policy.description: Current policy settings: return_window_days, restocking_fee_pct, free_returns.

analysis.description: Refund pattern analysis with top reasons, approval rates, and avg amounts.

estimated_impact.description: Projected impact on retention, costs, and conversion.
